data.title: O-I Glass Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Today, in Perrysburg, Ohio, O-I Glass, Inc. (NYSE: OI) disclosed its financial performance for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Pacira BioSciences sends proxy materials and shareholder letter; important details included.
data.description: The latest report indicates that there has been a significant increase in unemployment rates, with the current figure reaching 7.9%. This represents a surge of 2.3 percentage points from the previous month. Additionally, the number of new jobless claims has also risen by 14,000, bringing the total to 870,000. These statistics highlight the ongoing challenges faced by the labor market as a result of the economic downturn. Experts believe that concerted efforts will be necessary to address this issue and support those affected by job losses.

data.title: FirstEnergy Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results, Reaffirms Guidance and Capital Plan to Deliver Value to Customers, Communities and Investors
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, the company disclosed GAAP earnings of $0.70 per share, along with Core Earnings (non-GAAP) amounting to $0.72 per share. They have committed almost $1.4 billion towards capital investments aimed at enhancing customer experiences. This investment aligns with their projected total investments of $6 billion for the year 2026. Additionally, they have outlined a comprehensive capital investment strategy totaling $36 billion to be spread over the years 2026 to 2030. The company has restated its commitment to these plans and initiatives.

data.title: ELS Declares Second Quarter 2026 Dividend
data.description: In Chicago on April 28, 2026, Equity LifeStyle Properties, Inc. announced that their Board of Directors declared a dividend of $0.5425 per common share for the second quarter of 2026. The company is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ELS.

data.title: Marine Products Corporation Announces Regular Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: Atlanta on April 28, 2026 - Marine Products Corporation (NYSE: MPX) shared updates that their Board of Directors have approved a usual quarterly cash dividend of $0.14 per share. This dividend will be paid on May 14, 2026, to common stockholders noted in records as of May 8, 2026.

data.title: First Financial Bancorp Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: In Cincinnati on April 28, 2026, First Financial Bancorp. (NASDAQ: FFBC) board of directors announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per common share. The dividend will be paid on June 15, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of June 1, 2026.

data.title: BD Board Declares Dividend
data.description: The Board of Directors of BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company), a prominent global medical technology corporation based in Franklin Lakes, N.J., revealed on April 28, 2026 that they have approved a quarterly dividend of $1.05 per common share. This dividend will be disbursed on June 30, 2026 to shareholders. BD, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol BDX, is renowned for its innovative healthcare solutions and services.

data.title: Disciplined Execution, Durable Momentum: Nabors 1Q 2026
data.description: In Hamilton, Bermuda, on April 28, 2026, Nabors Industries Ltd. disclosed a total of $784 million in operating revenues for the first quarter of 2026. The company experienced a net loss of $15 million attributed to Nabors' shareholders during this quarter, a notable change from the previous period's net income.

data.title: La-Z-Boy Incorporated Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Monroe, Michigan - On April 28, 2026, La-Z-Boy Incorporated (NYSE: LZB) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.242 per share on its common stock. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on June 15, 2026. La-Z-Boy is a prominent player in the residential furniture retail and manufacturing industry globally.

data.title: First Horizon Declares Cash Dividends on Common and Preferred Stock
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in Memphis, Tennessee, First Horizon Corporation (NYSE: FHN) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.17 per share on its common stock. The dividend will be paid on July 1, 2026, to shareholders of record.

data.title: Southwest Gas Holdings, Inc. to Report First Quarter 2026 Results on May 5, 2026
data.description: A conference call and webcast for Southwest Gas Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: SWX) will take place on May 5, 2026, at 11:00 AM ET to discuss the company's first quarter earnings. The event will be held in Las Vegas and is open to the public. Southwest Gas Holdings invites all interested parties to join the call to learn more about the financial performance and outlook of the company.

data.title: Hyperliquid Strategies Inc Announces Webcast to Discuss Results for the Fiscal Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Hyperliquid Strategies Inc (NASDAQ: PURR) revealed plans to conduct a live webcast on May 7, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The webcast will be hosted by HSI, a leading digital asset treasury platform known for its focus on the Hyperliquid ecosystem.

data.title: Host Emmanuel Acho & Bryan Johnson Headline World Class Broadcast Team Delivering the Inaugural Enhanced Games
data.description: Johnson will be featured in Netflix's "Don't Die: The Man Who Wants To Live Forever" as the world's most measured human and a human enhancement expert. His insights will be integral throughout the broadcast. Abby Labar from MLB Network will join as a co-host on the main broadcast desk. Johnson's expertise and labar's presence promise to provide a dynamic viewing experience for audiences.

data.title: Mirion Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In Atlanta, Mirion (NYSE: MIR), a company specializing in radiation detection solutions for various industries, revealed their first-quarter results for 2026. The company reported significant growth in orders driven by demand in the nuclear power sector. The Chairman and CEO of Mirion expressed satisfaction with the performance, highlighting the as-expected Adjusted EBITDA figures and strong profit margins. These results reflect positive momentum in the company's operations during the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Highwoods Announces Availability of First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Raleigh, North Carolina - On April 28, 2026, Highwoods Properties, Inc. (NYSE:HIW) announced their first quarter 2026 results. The report can be accessed through the investors section of their website, www.highwoods.com, or by clicking on the provided link.

data.description: On April 28, 2026, Apollo Commercial Real Estate Finance, Inc. (NYSE: ARI) shared its financial results for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026.
